docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LILLY, JEFFERSON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $925.00 FILED BY UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LILLY, JEFFERSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LILLY, JEFFERSON
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $848.09 FILED BY LILLY, JEFFERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINITFF JEFFERSON LILLY WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED DEC-17-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PLAINITFF JEFFERSON LILLY WAIVES SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LILLY, JEFFERSON $160.56 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $200.56, PLAINTIFF WAIVED SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO KEEP $764.44 OF DEFENDANT'S DEPOSIT FOR PRO-RATED RENT THROUGH DECEMBER 20, 2007, PLUS DEFENDANT'S SHARE OF UTILITIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO PLTF.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY DEFENDANT UKEN, JEFF C/O PRUDENTIAL INVESTMENT MGMT. AS TO PLAINTIFF LILLY, JEFFERSON
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2008 - JUDGMENT ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FOR BOTH SIDES RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK-S. VANTREE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CROSS-COMPLAINANT-JEFF UKEN HEARING SET FOR JAN-23-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
